title: Blockchain Examination Process Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the secure, transparent, and decentralized process of taking and grading a semester-end examination on a blockchain, from student submission to final grade recording.
relationships: Student submits hashed exam answers to Smart Contract
Smart Contract locks submission and notifies Professor
Professor submits grade to Smart Contract
Validator Nodes consensus-verify grade and submission integrity
Verified grade is permanently recorded on Immutable Ledger
